async (intermediate) => { if (intermediate.error) return intermediate; const limit = intermediate.limit || 20; const formatPostTime = (ts) => { if (!ts) return ''; const CST_OFFSET_MS = 8 * 60 * 60 * 1000; const date = new Date(ts + CST_OFFSET_MS); const pad = (v) => String(v).padStart(2, '0'); return date.getUTCFullYear() + '年' + pad(date.getUTCMonth() + 1) + '月' + pad(date.getUTCDate()) + '日 ' + pad(date.getUTCHours()) + ':' + pad(date.getUTCMinutes()); }; const buildNoteDetailUrl = (noteId) => noteId ? 'https://creator.xiaohongshu.com/statistics/note-detail?noteId=' + encodeURIComponent(noteId) : ''; const data = intermediate.captured; const items = data?.data?.note_infos ?? []; if (!items.length) return { error: 'No notes found', needTap: true }; const notes = items.map(item => ({ id: item.id ?? '', title: item.title ?? '', date: formatPostTime(item.post_time), views: item.read_count ?? 0, likes: item.like_count ?? 0, collects: item.fav_count ?? 0, comments: item.comment_count ?? 0, url: buildNoteDetailUrl(item.id) })); return notes.slice(0, limit).map((n, i) => ({ rank: i + 1, ...n })); }

description: 小红书创作者笔记列表 + 每篇数据 (标题/日期/观看/点赞/收藏/评论)
name: CreatorNotes
